summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PPL Board Beta Prediction feature. All backend API tests passed. Frontend Beta Prediction component works correctly on both PreMatch and LiveMatch pages. The beta-predict endpoint returns full prediction bundle with Monte Carlo 10K simulations, Poisson distributions, player predictions, odds engine with 10% house edge, and GPT-5.4 contextual analysis.
passed_tests: GET /api/ returns 200 with version 3.0.0
GET /api/schedule returns matches correctly
POST /api/matches/{matchId}/beta-predict returns 200
Beta prediction response contains monte_carlo with 10000 simulations
Beta prediction response contains team1_win_prob and team2_win_prob
Beta prediction response contains score ranges (p10, p25, p50, p75, p90)
Beta prediction response contains player_predictions array with name, predicted_runs, predicted_wickets, confidence
Beta prediction response contains poisson.runs_distribution array
Beta prediction response contains poisson.wickets_distribution array
Beta prediction response contains odds.team1 and odds.team2 with true_odds, house_odds, implied_probability
Beta prediction response contains match_context with phase, pressure, powerplay/middle/death flags
Beta prediction response contains gpt_analysis with tactical_insight
Beta prediction with market_team1_odds and market_team2_odds returns value_bets array
Beta prediction for invalid match returns error correctly
Frontend PreMatch page shows Beta Prediction component in right sidebar
PreMatch page shows market odds inputs (team1 and team2)
PreMatch page shows Run Beta Prediction button
Clicking Run Beta Prediction triggers API call and shows loading spinner
Beta prediction results show Monte Carlo 10K summary with win probabilities
Beta prediction results show Odds Engine with 10% house edge
Beta prediction results show GPT-5.4 Analysis with tactical insight
Beta prediction results show match context badges (powerplay, pressure)
Beta tab sections work: Overview, Players, Poisson, Alerts
Players tab shows player prediction table with formula (0.4*Last5 + 0.3*Venue + 0.2*Opp + 0.1*Form)
Poisson tab shows projected total and wickets distribution chart
Alerts tab shows 'No active alerts' when no alerts present
Frontend LiveMatch page shows Beta tab as default selected tab
LiveMatch page shows Beta Prediction component after fetching live data
Existing Fetch Live Scores button still works on live match page
POST /api/matches/{matchId}/fetch-live still works
GET /api/matches/{matchId}/state still works
GET /api/squads still works
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: 70 IPL 2026 matches already in MongoDB from previous iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Beta Prediction feature fully implemented and working. The beta-predict endpoint takes 20-40 seconds due to GPT-5.4 web search calls for player stats and contextual analysis. Use --max-time 120 for curl tests. Match IDs: ipl2026_007 (CSK vs PBKS live), ipl2026_008 (DC vs MI upcoming). Do NOT trigger /api/schedule/load?force=true.
